title: Remove All Backward Compatibility Layers
summary: Removed ALL backward compatibility / legacy reconstruction code from the 0840 JSONB normalization series. ONE clean path only — no config_data dict, no legacy field name mappings, no dual systems.

details: api/endpoints/products/models.py: Added TechStackSchema, ArchitectureSchema, TestConfigSchema. Replaced config_data/has_config_data with typed fields in ProductCreate, ProductUpdate, ProductResponse.
api/endpoints/products/crud.py: Replaced _build_product_response() to expose normalized fields via typed schemas. Added override_active parameter. Updated create/update endpoints.
api/endpoints/products/lifecycle.py: Removed duplicate _build_product_response() (77 lines). Now imports from crud.py.

src/giljo_mcp/services/product_service.py: Removed ALL legacy field name fallbacks from _create_config_relations and _update_config_relations. Changed create_product/update_product to accept tech_stack, architecture, test_config, core_features as separate params.

frontend/src/components/products/ProductForm.vue: Replaced configData wrapper with flat techStack, architecture, testConfig, coreFeatures. Renamed all short field names to canonical column names. Updated saveProduct() and loadProductData().
frontend/src/components/products/ProductDetailsDialog.vue: Replaced all product.config_data.* references with direct field access. Updated display labels to canonical names.
frontend/src/services/api.js: Updated products.create() and products.update() to send normalized fields.
frontend/src/views/ProductsView.vue: Simplified saveProduct() and productForm to remove stale configData structure.
api/endpoints/messages.py: Removed to_agent compat field from MessageResponse. Updated list_messages to use to_agents list instead of to_agent single value.
frontend/src/types/message.ts: Removed to_agent backward compat alias.

All legacy short-name mappings removed (languages->programming_languages, frontend->frontend_frameworks, backend->backend_frameworks, database->databases_storage, pattern->primary_pattern, notes->architecture_notes, strategy->test_strategy, frameworks->testing_frameworks).
Frontend form bindings use canonical column names directly.
Service layer accepts canonical names only — no fallbacks.
